title: Forest of Shadows
author: CYOA Engine
description: Venture into the cursed Forest of Shadows and uncover its dark secrets.

forest_entrance.title: The Forest Entrance
forest_entrance.text: You stand before the Forest of Shadows. Ancient oaks twist overhead, their gnarled branches blotting out the sun. A worn path splits ahead — one trail leads deeper into the dark woods, the other skirts the forest edge toward a faint glow of firelight.

imagePrompt.subject: Towering gnarled oaks forming a dark archway over a split dirt path, canopy blocking all sky

choices.text: Take the path into the deep forest

dark_path.title: The Dark Path
dark_path.text: The forest closes in around you. Without light, every shadow seems to move. You stumble over roots, losing precious energy. Up ahead you glimpse the outline of a ruined stone shrine.

imagePrompt.subject: Narrow forest track choked with roots and undergrowth, distant crumbled stone shape barely visible in darkness

choices.text: Light your torch and move cautiously

hermit_camp.title: The Hermit's Camp
hermit_camp.text: A weathered old hermit sits beside a crackling fire. His eyes, sharp beneath thick brows, assess you quickly. 'Few come to this forest by choice,' he rasps. 'Take this torch — you'll need it where the shadows are thickest.' He hands you a sturdy torch.

imagePrompt.subject: Gaunt old man with deep-set eyes seated at a small campfire, handing a torch across the flames, dark forest behind him

choices.text: Ask the hermit about the forest
Thank him and head into the forest

hermit_lore.title: The Hermit's Warning
hermit_lore.text: The hermit leans forward. 'There is a shrine deep within — the old gods were worshipped there. An amulet rests on the altar. Take it, and the forest spirits will hound you forever. Leave it, and they may show you a path out.' He stares into the flames and says no more.

imagePrompt.subject: Weathered old man's face close, firelight casting deep shadows across hollow cheeks, fixed stare into flames

lit_path.title: The Lit Path
lit_path.text: Torchlight pushes back the shadows. The forest feels less oppressive now, and you make better time without stumbling. The path leads to a clearing where the ruined shrine stands.

imagePrompt.subject: Forest path lit by a single torch, warm orange light pushing back dense shadow on either side, shrine clearing ahead

ruined_shrine.title: The Ruined Shrine
ruined_shrine.text: Crumbling stone pillars surround a moss-covered altar. Atop it rests a dark amulet shaped like a crescent moon, pulsing with faint violet light. The air hums with an ancient power.

imagePrompt.subject: Moss-encrusted stone altar between broken pillars, crescent amulet emitting faint dim light on the altar surface

choices.text: Leave the amulet and pay your respects

spirits_awaken.title: The Spirits Awaken
spirits_awaken.text: The moment your fingers close around the amulet, the shadows coil into shapes — hollow-eyed spirits that shriek and claw at you. You run, but their cold touch saps your strength.

imagePrompt.subject: Writhing shadow-forms with hollow white eyes surging up from the ground around a fleeing figure clutching a glowing crescent

choices.text: Flee the forest with the amulet

forest_spirits_guide.title: Guided by Spirits
forest_spirits_guide.text: Soft lights drift up from the altar — wisps, gentle and warm. They circle you slowly, then drift down a hidden path that was invisible moments ago. The forest parts before you as if grateful.

imagePrompt.subject: Small pale wisps rising from a stone altar and drifting toward a narrow gap opening in the dark treeline

escaped_with_amulet.title: Escaped — At a Cost
escaped_with_amulet.text: You burst out of the tree line, gasping. The amulet burns cold in your pocket. The forest spirits will never stop hunting you now — but the amulet is yours. For now.

imagePrompt.subject: Ragged figure stumbling out of a black treeline onto open ground at night, hand clutching coat pocket

safe_exit.title: The Forest Parts
safe_exit.text: The wisps lead you along a winding path that opens onto a sunlit meadow. You leave the Forest of Shadows behind, lighter somehow — and wiser. Some prizes are not worth taking.

imagePrompt.subject: Narrow winding path emerging from dense dark forest onto open pale grassland, solitary figure at threshold

consumed_by_shadows.title: Consumed
consumed_by_shadows.text: The spirits drag you down into the cold earth beneath the shrine. The forest swallows your screams. The amulet will wait for the next fool.

imagePrompt.subject: Grasping shadow-hands pulling a figure down into cracked earth beneath a shrine altar, darkness absolute above

torch.description: A sturdy wooden torch that keeps the shadows at bay.

moon_amulet.description: A crescent amulet that pulses with violet light. The spirits want it back.
